questions.question: Strictly calculate the correct statement regarding Electrochemistry Redox: According to Kohlrausch's law of independent migration of ions, the limiting molar conductivity of an electrolyte is equal to: [Variant 2-1]

options.A: The sum of the individual contributions of the anion and cation of the electrolyte
options.B: The product of the specific conductivities
options.C: The difference between cation and anion mobilities
